meta.title: 职场哲学与工作意义
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on the philosophy of work in Chinese: idioms, burnout, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 직업 철학·일의 의미 담화: 성어, 번아웃, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「安身立命」is an idiom meaning "to find a stable place to settle and establish oneself in life".
explanation.ko: 「安身立命」는 '몸을 의탁하고 인생의 근거를 마련하다'라는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「安身立命」是什么意思？(What does 安身立命 mean?)
choices: 安身立命(finding a stable foundation for one's life and career)

explanation.en: 「职业倦怠」(zhíyè juàndài) means "burnout", exhaustion and negative feelings from prolonged work stress.
explanation.ko: 「职业倦怠」(zhíyè juàndài)는 장기간의 업무 스트레스로 인한 심신 피로와 부정적 정서를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「职业倦怠」是什么意思？(What does 职业倦怠 mean?)
choices: 因长期工作压力而产生的身心疲惫和消极情绪(physical and mental exhaustion and negative emotions caused by long-term work stress)

explanation.en: A sense of meaning in work usually stems from the realization of personal value and a sense of contributing to society.
explanation.ko: 일의 의미감은 보통 개인적 가치 실현과 사회 기여감에서 비롯된다.

questions.prompt: 「工作的意义感」通常来源于什么？(What does 工作的意义感 usually stem from?)
choices: 个人价值实现与对社会贡献的感知(the realization of personal value and a sense of contributing to society)

explanation.en: 「躺平」(tǎngpíng, lit. "lying flat") is a contemporary term describing a passive, low-desire response to intense competition and pressure.
explanation.ko: 「躺平」(tǎngpíng)는 치열한 경쟁과 압박에 대해 소극적으로 대응하며 욕망을 낮추는 태도를 뜻하는 현대 용어이다.

questions.prompt: 「躺平」是什么意思？(What does 躺平 mean, in the context of contemporary work culture?)
choices: 对高强度竞争采取消极应对、降低欲望的态度(a passive attitude of lowering ambitions in response to intense competition)

explanation.en: This phrase means everyone contributes according to their ability and receives fair rewards for their labor.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 각자 능력에 따라 노력을 기울이고 그에 상응하는 보상을 받는다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「劳有所得，各尽所能」是什么意思？(What does 劳有所得，各尽所能 mean?)
choices: 每个人依据自身能力付出努力，并获得相应的回报(everyone contributes according to their ability and receives corresponding rewards)

explanation.en: 「安身立命」means "finding a stable foundation for life and career".
explanation.ko: 「安身立命」는 '삶의 안정된 기반을 찾다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 找到一份能让自己___的工作，是许多人一生追求的目标。(Finding a job that allows one to find a stable foundation in life is a goal many people pursue their whole lives.)

explanation.en: 「职业倦怠」means "burnout".
explanation.ko: 「职业倦怠」는 '직업 소진'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 长期高强度的工作压力，让许多职场人士深陷___之中。(Long-term high-intensity work stress has trapped many professionals in burnout.)

explanation.en: 「工作的意义感」means "sense of meaning in work".
explanation.ko: 「工作的意义感」는 '일의 의미감'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 对许多人来说，___不仅仅来自于薪资，更来自于自我价值的实现。(For many people, a sense of meaning in work comes not only from salary, but even more from the realization of self-worth.)

explanation.en: 「躺平」describes a passive, low-desire response to intense pressure.
explanation.ko: 「躺平」는 압박에 대한 소극적·저욕망 대응을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 面对激烈的职场竞争，一些年轻人选择___，降低对物质成功的追求。(Facing intense workplace competition, some young people choose to "lie flat," lowering their pursuit of material success.)

explanation.en: This describes fair contribution and reward based on ability.
explanation.ko: 이는 능력에 따른 공정한 기여와 보상을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 理想的职场环境应该做到___，让每个人的付出都得到应有的尊重和回报。(An ideal workplace environment should ensure everyone contributes according to their ability and is fairly rewarded, so that everyone's effort receives due respect and compensation.)
choices: 每个人依据自身能力付出努力，并获得相应的回报

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这项调查___了当代职场人普遍存在的焦虑与迷茫情绪。(This survey revealed the widespread anxiety and confusion among contemporary professionals.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，___不如认真思考自己真正想要的职业方向。(Rather than wasting time in meaningless busyness, it's better to seriously consider one's true desired career direction.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这份工作___薪资待遇优厚，___如果缺乏成就感，依然难以让人长久坚持。(Even if this job has generous pay, if it lacks a sense of accomplishment, it's still hard for people to stick with it long-term.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，___是因为他们不再满足于单纯的物质回报。(The reason more and more young people are re-examining the meaning of work is precisely because they are no longer satisfied with mere material rewards.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，___愿意为之付出全部的热情与努力。(Once a person finds a career they truly love, they are willing to devote all their passion and effort to it.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，工作的真正意义___在于实现自我价值与服务他人的统一。(In the final analysis, the true meaning of work still lies in the unity of realizing self-worth and serving others.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，个人志趣与社会需求的契合程度___影响着一个人的职业满意度。(From this we can see that both personal interests and the degree of alignment with social needs jointly influence a person's job satisfaction.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，缺乏成就感的工作___容易让人陷入职业倦怠。(As everyone knows, work lacking a sense of accomplishment often easily leads people into burnout.)

explanation.en: 「发挥」(fāhuī) means "to bring into play/fully utilize".
explanation.ko: 「发挥」(fāhuī)는 '발휘하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这份工作让他有机会___自己的专业技能，实现自我价值。(This job gives him the opportunity to fully utilize his professional skills, realizing his self-worth.)

explanation.en: 「获得」(huòdé) means "to obtain/gain".
explanation.ko: 「获得」(huòdé)는 '얻다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一份有意义的工作应该能让人从中___成就感和归属感。(A meaningful job should allow a person to gain a sense of accomplishment and belonging from it.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 认真思考〜: 不如认真思考 (not 认真不如思考).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '认真思考〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如认真思考'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，认真不如思考自己真正想要的职业方向。(Rather than wasting time in meaningless busyness, it's better to seriously consider one's true desired career direction.) — find the error
choices: 与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，不如认真思考自己真正想要的职业方向。
与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，认真不如思考自己真正想要的职业方向。
与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，不如思考认真自己真正想要的职业方向。
与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，认真思考不如自己真正想要的职业方向。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，因为是他们不再满足于单纯的物质回报。(The reason more and more young people are re-examining the meaning of work is precisely because they are no longer satisfied with mere material rewards.) — find the error
choices: 越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，是因为他们不再满足于单纯的物质回报。
越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，因为是他们不再满足于单纯的物质回报。
越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，是他们因为不再满足于单纯的物质回报。
越来越多的年轻人之所以重新审视工作的意义，他们是因为不再满足于单纯的物质回报。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，愿意才为之付出全部的热情与努力。(Once a person finds a career they truly love, they are willing to devote all their passion and effort to it.) — find the error
choices: 一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，就愿意为之付出全部的热情与努力。
一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，愿意才为之付出全部的热情与努力。
一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，才愿意为之付出全部的热情与努力。
一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，愿意为之才付出全部的热情与努力。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，不如认真思考自己真正想要的职业方向 ("Rather than wasting time in meaningless busyness, it's better to seriously consider one's true desired career direction").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，不如认真思考自己真正想要的职业方向' (의미 없는 바쁨 속에서 시간을 허비하느니 차라리 진정 원하는 커리어 방향을 진지하게 고민하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其在无意义的忙碌中虚度光阴，__________自己真正想要的职业方向。(Rather than wasting time in meaningless busyness, it's better to seriously consider one's true desired career direction.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，就愿意为之付出全部的热情与努力 ("Once a person finds a career they truly love, they are willing to devote all their passion and effort to it").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，就愿意为之付出全部的热情与努力' (사람은 일단 진심으로 사랑하는 일을 찾으면 그것을 위해 모든 열정과 노력을 기꺼이 바친다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦找到了真正热爱的事业，__________为之付出全部的热情与努力。(Once a person finds a career they truly love, they are willing to devote all their passion and effort to it.)
